text:
Market today: A mixed bag with tech earnings in focus and rising geopolitical tensions. The chip sector, which dominates your book, is seeing positive news from Nvidia but faces potential headwinds from new tariffs and US-China AI sanctions.

Your holdings: SOXL (-37.59%) and SPAL (-45.49%), both leveraged ETFs, are deep in the red and demand immediate attention. Margin amplifies these drops. QQQI (-2.04%) is also flagged for a trim.

Watch: Keep a close eye on any tariff announcements and US-China AI rhetoric, as these could significantly impact your tech/chip exposure. Also, monitor the broader market reaction to Tesla's earnings.

Bottom line: Prioritize managing your leveraged, losing positions and stay vigilant on geopolitical developments impacting tech.
plays: SOXL: Consider reducing exposure to this leveraged ETF, given the -37.59% loss and "SELL" status. Its decay and margin risk are significant.
SPAL: Review this new, leveraged position at -45.49%. Leveraged ETFs are very volatile, and this loss is substantial.
NVDA: The scanner shows a long setup (entry 205.64-205.28, stop 204.47) and strong news. This could be an "Add" or "New Buy" if you want to increase chip exposure.
